description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat, dark roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a neatly maintained lawn and paved driveway. The structure features large windows, especially prominent on the front and rear facades, allowing for ample natural light. The exterior walls appear to be a mix of dark and neutral tones, likely a combination of brick or concrete and glass. A garage is integrated into the left side of the building, accessible from the main road. The property is bordered by paved walkways and driveways, with a clear separation between the house and the surrounding green space. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on functional, open-plan living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat dark roof, large windows, and an integrated garage, set within a landscaped lawn and paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the garage facing the street.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the garage entrance and the driveway connecting to the main road.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a wide expanse of lawn and large rear-facing windows.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the side yard, additional windows, and the driveway wrapping around the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and rear windows
